ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the college to which the department belongs */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college */,
  "department_code" TEXT /* Unique department code */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colleges" (
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the college */,
  "college_code" TEXT /* Unique college code */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the college record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the college record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cohorts" (
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cohort */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the cohort (e.g., 2014, 2015) */,
  "cohort_name" TEXT /* Name of the cohort */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cohort record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cohort record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cohort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cohort year */,
  "graduation_rate" TEXT /* Graduation rate for the department in the given cohort */,
  "retention_rate" TEXT /* Retention rate for the department in the given cohort */,
  "completion_rate" TEXT /* Completion rate for the department in the given cohort */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_cohort_id FOREIGN KEY ("cohort_id") REFERENCES cohorts ("cohort_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_performance" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for historical performance data */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cohort year */,
  "graduation_rate" TEXT /* Graduation rate for historical performance */,
  "retention_rate" TEXT /* Retention rate for historical performance */,
  "completion_rate" TEXT /* Completion rate for historical performance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the historical performance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the historical performance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_performance_cohort_id FOREIGN KEY ("cohort_id") REFERENCES cohorts ("cohort_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_performance_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, faculty, department head) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
